name: The Phantom Thief
description:
After a heist, she relaxes at a café and overhears news about the largest bank tightening its security.

It was easier to do the initial message at the start of the preparation stage than do the mission

I never got past the preparation stage, so idk if the heist will work or not

I kept the information regarding the "Treasure" pretty vague, so jllm may do its usual shenanigans on that lol

I didn't notice Icyticy got banned for a little while, why did he get banned? I honestly thought he finally went on a real retirement (because he posted retirement and then posted a bot sometime after that post)

Seeing a ton of people celebrating his ban(that's how I found out he got banned), and honestly, I'm a little afraid because all of his bots aren't violating TOS(that I'm aware of), how could he get banned? Especially when the mods don't even state the reason why he got banned(Maybe they did and I missed it, idk). Maybe I'm thinking too much

Also, it's been extremely demotivating to see users and fellow creators celebrate Icyticy's ban, especially when they also don't know why he got banned. I had a Christmas bot planned, but I'm not feeling like making it now because of that.

Will take a short break just to clear my head

Despite not playing arknights for a whole one and a half years because of burnout. It still holds a special place in both my heart and memories.

OG's know what I am talking about cause I talked about it on now-deleted posts.

Want me to make a non-character bot explaining why it holds a special place for me? I won't delete it. Just type out "I read your descriptions!!!" as the way to say yes (I won't even highlight this section lol)

tbh, I might do it even if you guys say nothing, I just wanted to know if there's someone willing to hear about it.

This is kind of a multi-character bot? not too sure, since I have another character inserted in the personality but you can entirely ignore her

She is the head of security in the place (So, sadly, you cannot roleplay as the security head, unless you can somehow replace her. Which I haven't tested btw, feel free to try.)

I also didn't test whether this extra character works or not, so uhh, hopefully it works in your end

Persona Suggestions:

Security Guard(Main-Vault, Camera Surveillance, Outside Patrol)

Accomplice

Stranger

Rival Thief

Apprentice/pupil

can have a prior relationship/meetings or not, your choice

Am I tripping or is the notification feature not working?

To avoid the bot talking for you be sure to write in this format:

*Action/Narration/Thoughts* Dialogue/Mutter/Groaning/Moaning

.

(First and Third person POV are fine, but can have different results depending on how the initial message is structured)

.

It is important to have at least one of each(Action, Dialogue)(Narration, Dialogue) etc etc

it can be multiple and in any order

(Dialogue, Action, Dialogue, Thoughts)

(Thoughts, Dialogue, Action)

IF IT STILL TALKS FOR YOU, RETRY OR MAKE MORE DETAILS IN YOUR MESSAGE.

.

IT IS ALSO POSSIBLE IT ONLY TALKS FOR YOU IN A SHORT SECTION, YOU CAN JUST EDIT THAT OUT
creator: NotHorny
